dashboard.heroSubtitle: Book a consultation, message your doctor, and track medicines in one place. Self-assessment worksheets can prefill notes when you book.
dashboard.selfAssessmentBody: Optional structured notes for your own reference. They are not a medical diagnosis and do not replace a consultation. Saved answers can be pulled into your booking form below.

book.title: Book consultation
book.worksheetBlurb: Notes from your saved worksheet {{label}} are included below. Edit them before you book — they are sent with your intake.
book.worksheetNotesPlaceholder: Summarize what you want the doctor to see from your worksheet
book.noLocations: No active clinic locations yet. Choose online consultation or contact support.
book.preferredCentreHintBefore: We use this for records and follow-up; your visit stays
book.afterPayment: After payment, consultation moves to doctor assignment.

consultations.title: Your consultations
consultations.rxOnFile: Prescription on file — open this case to view details.
consultations.emptyBody: When you’re ready, use Book consultation below, or complete a self-assessment worksheet first — saved worksheet notes can be added automatically when you book.

journey.PAYMENT_PENDING: Next step: complete payment to confirm your consultation.
journey.PAID: Paid — we will assign a doctor. You’ll use chat here once assigned.
journey.ASSIGNED: Doctor assigned — open this case to message them.
journey.IN_PROGRESS: In progress — keep messaging your doctor in this consultation.
journey.PRESCRIPTION_UPLOADED: Prescription shared — review medicines and today’s doses below.
journey.COMPLETED: Completed — you can book a new consultation anytime.

reminders.title: Reminder preferences
reminders.footnote: Preferences are stored on your account. Channels that are not live yet are labelled below; only active channels may send notifications today.

selfDiagnosis.hubBody: These forms mirror the kingdom and miasm sections used in clinical method intake. Filling them out does not replace a consultation and is not a medical diagnosis. Your answers are saved privately on your account.
selfDiagnosis.crisis: Emergency or crisis? Call your local emergency number or go to the nearest hospital. This site is not for emergencies.
selfDiagnosis.disclaimer: This worksheet is for your personal notes. It is not a diagnosis or treatment plan from a doctor.
selfDiagnosis.loadError: Could not load this worksheet. Check your connection and try again.
selfDiagnosis.saveNoticeWithSummary: Saved to your account. On your dashboard, booking can include these notes in your consultation intake.
selfDiagnosis.saveNoticeEmpty: Saved to your account. Add worksheet answers if you want to copy them into a future booking.

payment.msgCheckout: Complete payment in the Razorpay popup.
payment.msgVerifying: Please wait while we verify with the gateway.
payment.msgSuccess: Your consultation is now ready for doctor assignment. You’ll see updates here once a doctor is assigned.
payment.msgErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

consultation.rxPatientHint: Your doctor manages updates in the Doctor app. You can view published plans here.
consultation.rxPending: When your doctor publishes a prescription, it will appear here.
consultation.uploadHint: Images (camera or gallery) and PDF lab reports. Max 15 MB.
consultation.doctorWorkspaceBody: prescriptions, medicine versions, and clinical photos are managed in the Vitalis Doctor app.
consultation.messagePlaceholder: Ask a question or describe how you feel on the medicines…
consultation.chatHint: Use this chat for questions, side effects, or updates while you follow your plan.
consultation.selectConsultation: Select a consultation to view details.

notice.consultationCreated: Consultation created. Complete payment to continue.
notice.paymentVerified: Payment verified. Your doctor will be assigned shortly; check this page for updates.
notice.draftChatAdded: Draft added below in Chat — add details and send.
